div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Chargé in Great Britain (Laughlin)
div.p: 3549. For Sheldon [from War Trade Board]: No. 1857. Repeat to Denmark and Sweden. We have informed commercial Representative that from the point of view of conservation we could now spare practically all articles and that we would recommend to our associates an increase in the ration to such amounts as Denmark (Sweden) might need under the new conditions, suggesting that any further needs be laid before the Inter-Allied Committee at Copenhagen (Stockholm) for transmission to the A.B.C. and thence to the various governments concerned.
